hotel_name: KOBI Onsen Huế Resort, Liên Kết Bởi Melia (Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Melia)

reviews.title: Don't bother
reviews.text: The hotel is very far from everything. Most services were close such as the restaurant, spa facilities and bar because of the lack of people at the hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good swimming pool and spa facilities.
reviews.negatives:
Air condition in the spa was broken. Air condition in the lobby area was turned off. The manager decided that above 30° it's not hot enough. Moreover , the staff started to control the air condition in the rooms and fix it on twenty five degrees. Only after our complain they reduced the temperature to twenty two degrees as we ask.
Another problem is that there are no shelves in the closet.

reviews.title: Facilitates is not good
reviews.text: With deluxe: No bathtub, no swimming pool, no mention of the gym, rooms not soundproof, hallways not well-lit, and no pleasant scent.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Nghiem,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá.

We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet expectations, particularly regarding the facilities and overall comfort. Please allow us to clarify that our Deluxe room category does not include a bathtub, and certain facilities such as the swimming pool and gym are shared amenities within the resort. However, we truly apologize if this information was not communicated clearly prior to your arrival.

We are also sorry to hear about your concerns related to soundproofing, hallway lighting, and overall ambiance. Your feedback has been noted and shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement, as we continuously strive to enhance the guest experience.

We truly appreciate your comments, as they help us identify areas where we can do better. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back and provide a m

reviews.title: I felt hot here so I felt uncomfortable even though the onsen, sauna service and staff were good
reviews.positives: Onsen & sauna
reviews.negatives: Do not turn on the air conditioner in the lobby, elevator and hallways.

reviews.title: The resturant  and  onsen was bad  ,  the room is big and nice with a good view
reviews.text:
Very disappointed  the  don't eat the steak  at the resturant order 2 steaks was very bad .

The onsen was  bad  and very  dirty and looked not maintained.

The room is big  and clean ,  with a good view only positive 

Won't  stay again  very bad experience over all
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Sean,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are truly sorry that your experience with the restaurant and onsen did not meet your expectations, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

Your comments about the dining experience have been shared with our culinary team for review and improvement.Regarding the onsen, we are very sorry for the discomfort you encountered. Our onsen area is cleaned and maintained daily according to a fixed schedule. However, because the water is a natural mineral hot spring, the high sulfur content can sometimes cause marks or residue on surrounding surfaces, which may give the impression of wear even though the facilities are sanitized regularly. We will reinforce inspection and housekeeping follow-up to ensure the area remains both clean and reassuring in appearance.

On a positive note, we are glad that you were pleased with the spacious and comfortable room as well as the view, and we truly appreciate you acknowledg

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff are very friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: The living room had a moldy smell, the sulfur smell from the onsen was very difficult to get rid off our bodies.

reviews.title: Thông tin tiền bạc không rõ ràng và không hỗ trợ khách
reviews.text:
Mình mua phòng chưa có gói tắm nước nóng, đến nơi thì lễ tân tư vấn dki tài khoản để được giảm giá, mình thực hiện đăng ký, và hôm sau đi đăng ký tắm suối thì kết quả bị charge tiền nhiều hơn rất nhiều, sau đó mới được nhận giải thích là chỉ dc giảm trong ngày, nhưng trc đó k hề nói cho mình biết., còn nhân viên bên khu suối nước nóng thì charge tiền sai cho con mình, sau khi mình sử dụng dịch vụ xong thì quay ra yêu cầu mình trả thêm tiền.
Khi mình quay lại lễ tân để nói vấn đề thì resort tiếp nhận xong chỉ xin lỗi chứ không có động thái giải quyết.
reviews.response:
Xin chào chị My,

Cảm ơn chị đã chia sẻ thẳng thắn trải nghiệm của mình tại Kobi Onsen Resort Huế, Affiliated by Meliá. Chúng em rất tiếc khi kỳ nghỉ lần này chưa mang đến sự hài lòng như chị mong đợi, đặc biệt là ở phần tư vấn giá và dịch vụ tắm khoáng nóng.

Về việc đăng ký tài khoản thành viên, các bạn nhân viên giới thiệu chương trình với mong muốn giúp chị nhận được lợi ích cao nhất thông qua điểm chào mừng để quy đổi và giảm trừ chi phí trong hóa đơn dịch vụ.

Đối với chi phí tắm khoáng nóng, mức giá nâng hạng phòng tại Lễ tân khi nhận phòng sẽ khác với giá mua trực tiếp tại khu vực Onsen. Chúng em thành thật xin lỗi vì thông tin giữa hai bộ phận chưa được truyền đạt rõ ràng, khiến chị gặp hiểu nhầm trong quá trình sử dụng dịch vụ. Tuy vậy, đội ngũ đã áp dụng mức ưu đãi thấp hơn giá công bố cho gia đình mình, nhưng đáng tiếc trải nghiệm vẫn chưa thật sự suôn sẻ như chị mong đợi.

Việc nhân viên tại khu Onsen kiểm tra lại chi phí sau khi sử dụng dịch vụ là quy trình cần thiết để đ

reviews.title: A relaxing start to Vietnam!
reviews.positives:
The staff were good. It had nice landscaping and lovely koi fish pond as well! 
I had a hot stone massage and San was wonderful. She cared to check in to make sure I was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The men’s Onsen had both the steam room and jacuzzi tub not working and even if paying for Onsen separately, no discount was made.

reviews.title: Place for relax
reviews.text:
Far from the center.
If you are looking for a quiet place to relax and enjoy. This will be the best choice. If you go with family or friends, it will be a bit boring because you have to go to the center for sightseeing and other activities.
Good facilities, friendly staff.
--------------
Xa trung tâm.
Nếu bạn tìm kiếm một nơi yên tĩnh để nghỉ ngơi và tận hưởng. Đây sẽ là lựa chọn tốt nhất. Nếu đi cùng gia đình hoặc bạn bè, sẽ hơi buồn chán vì bạn phải đến trung tâm để tham quan và các hoạt động khác.
Tiện nghi tốt, nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room still needs to improve more! Great view!

reviews.title: Terrible Onsen experience
reviews.text:
For the first time in my life I have to leave the Onsen because they let kids with swimming goggles, jump in to the tub, screaming... No staff say a word to them or their parent! 
Also people wearing socks & underwear in to the onsen area. 🤔
I decided to come all the way for it because they advertise it as "tradition Japanese Onsen experience" - if you want to come for the Onsen, some relaxing time... You should think twice. 
Hope the management can do something about it, so people in Viet Nam can truely experience what is called Onsen.
The property itself is fine.

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.positives: Almost everything
reviews.negatives: Airconditioning did not work at lobby

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: I can not say that five stars hotel. I have read the reviews before I came here. The reviews says the guests feel like VIP.  Nothing special or luxury. You can have similar room or service at the other four stars hotel.   We  had dinner at the restaurant and it was terrible , we had to return the dish. Not tasty. There was no apologies.  We were not so happy. The only one good thing I can say about cleanliness.

reviews.title: It’s okay to visit once
reviews.positives: Peaceful beautiful
reviews.negatives: Food service and location

reviews.title: Clean and nice
reviews.text: Value for money, but location is out of city

reviews.title: Nice place, a couple of key problems
reviews.positives:
The rooms were nice and clean. 
The garden is nice and big enough for kids to run around. 
Breakfast was great, lots of variety and fresh options
reviews.negatives:
We weren't told about the swimming pool repairs - this was the only reason we chose this resort for our kids to play in.   
We bought tickets for the luxury onsen, but were then told upon arrival that we'd have to seperate the family as its non gender mixed.   We had to settle for the smaller two bath onsen to be together.

reviews.title: Onsen trip
reviews.text:
Resort is beautiful and clean.  There is hot spring spa on the resort.  We booked a room that included admission to the hot spring and breakfast. 

Breakfast was not very good.  Everything was pre-made and didn't taste very good.  Not many choices and pastries were not fresh.

Not much choice with dinner menu and pricey.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Ms. Sandy,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stay at Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá.

We are pleased to know that you found the resort beautiful and clean, and that you enjoyed the hot spring experience included in your stay. At the same time, we sincerely regret that our breakfast and dinner offerings did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments regarding food variety, freshness, and pricing have been shared with our culinary team for careful review, as this is an important area for us to continuously improve.

We truly appreciate your honest feedback, as it helps us refine our services and guest experience. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back and provide a more satisfying culinary experience alongside our wellness facilities.

Warm regards,

Linh Le
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Kobi should provide at least a very basic hot mineral bath.

reviews.title: Nice place to spend your vacation with family
reviews.text:
The view is so great, reminding me of Japanese theme in every corners.
It is clean, and everything is in order, look great. 
However, I must say it is a little small in normal room size, as well as the hallway.
There is problem of AC condition in childrend playground too, the staff alreafy informed me in advance, still it causes me problem of heat when my girl played in that place. 
Finally, the food and view from my room's balcony is so good.
Recommend for everyone!
reviews.response:
Xin chào Mr./ Ms. Nhân,

Warm greetings from Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá.

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.

We’re delighted to know that you enjoyed the beautiful scenery, Japanese-inspired design, and the overall atmosphere of our resort. It's also wonderful to hear that the view from your room and the food met your expectations.

At the same time, we truly appreciate your constructive comments regarding the room size, hallway space, and the air conditioning issue at the children's playground. We apologize for any discomfort this may have caused your family, and please rest assured that we are working to address and improve this area promptly.

Your kind recommendation means a lot to us. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you and your family back for an even better experience in the future.

Warm regards,

Linh Le
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: A secluded stay outside of Hue city center
reviews.positives: The resort is professionally managed. Staff were very nice and supportive. The villa is spacious and well equipped.
reviews.negatives: Location is too far from Hue city center

reviews.title: Tranquil Getaway!
reviews.text: It such a the peaceful escape.  One of the highlights of my stay was the onsen bath. The staff were warm and welcoming. However, the hotel is quite far from the city.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
+ Good Onzen
+ Friendly staff
reviews.negatives:
- Noises from karaoke 
- Noises from running children in the onsen

reviews.title: Good but far
reviews.text:
Nice place, clean, modern, but far from the city. Nothing to do around the hotel, so if you plan to spend a lot of time in the city it may not be the best choice.

Good for those that want to stay in the premises

reviews.title: Great place to recharge  - Onsen a must do!
reviews.positives: 3 bedroom villa was great! Bar near pool also fun full of games for kids. The onsen was a highlight!

reviews.title: About guess
reviews.text: Too noisy at pool and kid playing without safety…stuff need more stronger effort on guess don’t follow safety rules

reviews.title: I will turn back again
reviews.positives: The facilities are well taken care of every day, the view is beautiful, the restaurant serves a variety of delicious food, the staff is enthusiastic, professional, quiet, safe, the toilet is automatic in Japanese style, I love the bath oil, the smell of oriental medicine is very pleasant, convenient, airy space, I will come back when possible
reviews.negatives: The hot springs area can be noisy with children.

reviews.title: No value for money
reviews.text: High room tariff. No vegetarian food options available.
reviews.response:
Dear S,

Thank you for staying at Kawara My An Onsen Resort and rating us. We hope you had a wonderful time with us.
About the vegetarian food of the restaurant, we will consider your idea to set up it as soon as possible. 
Once, we would like to say thank you for the helpful review.
Wishing you and your family all the best.

Best regards,

reviews.title: KOBI Onsen Resort Hue - a valuable Japanese hot spring luxury, between Hue City  the Thuan An beach.
reviews.positives: Custumer-oriented and very sensitive restaurant staff.

reviews.title: Good place to relax with family
reviews.text: We stayed in a villa and overall it was a good experience. However, compared to Melia chain, the service level still has room for improvement. Also, their restaurant quality should be improved as we had a terrible experience there. They tried to do Japanese food but they did not know a basic Japanese food.
reviews.response:
Xin chào anh Duy,

Thank you for choosing Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá for your family getaway and for taking the time to share your review. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed the comfort of our villa and had a relaxing experience with your loved ones.

At the same time, we sincerely regret to learn that our restaurant and service levels did not fully meet your expectations. Your comments are very valuable, and we have already shared them with our culinary and service teams to further improve the quality and authenticity of our offerings.

We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you and provide a truly seamless and memorable stay in the future.

Warmest regards,

Linh Le
Guest Service Manager
reviews.room_type: Grand Two Bedroom Villa with Private Onsen

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff are imaging. The facility is super clean. The food is good. I wish water pressure is better and there a shower option. Bath is great, but shower is necessary especially when you traveling with limited time.
reviews.negatives: Bigger bathroom, better water pressure and shower.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: The hotel has great price and good pool

reviews.title: We highly recommend this place for someone who wants a retreat.
reviews.positives: The resort is clean and spacious. The bed is so big like a super king which we rarely to see bed of this size anywhere else. The Japanese Koi fishes are beautiful, breakfast was good variety even though it is the quiet time of the year. 9 steps Onsen was enjoyable experience .
reviews.negatives: I wish the outdoor swimming pool was heated.

reviews.title: Kobi
reviews.text: After checking we were advised pool was closed for renovations.so we checked out .

reviews.title: The best 5 star resort in Hue!!!
reviews.positives: Loved everything about this resort! Staff were amazing and very kind and go above and beyond for you. The all inclusive menu had good variety and quality was good. Amazing onsen (beter than some in Japan). Had one of the best massages here!Loved the quiet and peaceful atmosphere. Will write an extensive review on Google.
reviews.negatives: Wish I could stay longer (staying 3 night was clearly not enough)

reviews.title: Short trip to Hue
reviews.text: Everything about the hotel is good except that the service at the only restaurant needs improvement. Breakfast was crowded and apparently, not enough staff to handle the turnaround

reviews.title: Wholesome
reviews.positives: Decent Onsen services, relaxing stay
reviews.negatives: Convenient, quiet

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
We very happy stayed this hotel,love Julia yoga class the most she is a great yoga teacher.
Staffs has been great and care, lovely breakfast.
Surely we love to come back again Kobi and tks Julia.Cheers
reviews.response:
Xin chào Ms. Thu,

Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay at KOBI Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá, especially the yoga class with Yulia – she’ll be so happy to hear your praise.

Your appreciation means a lot to all of us, and we truly look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing stay.

Cheers and warm regards,

Linh Lê
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.positives: Everything was perfect. Got free access to Onsen, which was an incredible experience. A must to try when going to Onsen. The room is well-furnished and decorated. The resort is spacious with a big koi pool and many spots scattering the area to rest and  enjoy the view
reviews.negatives: Would be nice if the view of balcony is not blocked by the glass

reviews.text:
Far from the center.
If you are looking for a quiet place to relax and enjoy. This will be the best choice. If you go with family or friends, it will be a bit boring because you have to go to the center for sightseeing and other activities.
Good facilities, friendly staff.
--------

Nếu bạn tìm kiếm một nơi yên tĩnh để nghỉ ngơi và tận hưởng. Đây sẽ là lựa chọn tốt nhất. Nếu đi cùng gia đình hoặc bạn bè, sẽ hơi buồn chán vì bạn phải đến trung tâm để tham quan và các hoạt động khác.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with natural hot springs being our highlight!!
reviews.positives: The hotel is beautiful and peaceful, the staff friendly and kind, room and Onsen lovely and the location overlooking the paddy fields gorgeous.
reviews.negatives: The food was good, but could have been better in quality for the price and given the hotel. Should take more care when giving the free dessert ans it was a nice touch but missed the bar…everything tasted old and macaron was hard. One good item, would have been perfect. The food at the restaurant was good, but somehow lacked authenticity and taste profile it deserved. The ice cream bars in freezers were stale. I am being particular on this as I want this hotel to shine as it is otherwise is next to perfect.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: I must return with family members
reviews.positives: Excellent service , Excellent staff , marvellous resorts, excellent value for money
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Osen area too noisy
reviews.text: We stay one night at resort. Everything is good except very loud music from karaoke or party outside resort . We couldn't enjoy onsen outdoors and dinner at the restaurant upstairs.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Tu My, 
We are most grateful that you took the time to share with us your feedback about your recent stay at KOBI Onsen Resort Hue! 
However, we truly regret to learn that the experience did not meet your expectation due to the loud music from a local wedding outside of the resort. Please accept our sincerest apologies for any inconvenience caused.
We appreciate your business and hope that you will give us another opportunity to serve you in the future.
Best regards,

reviews.title: a luxury resort for total relaxation
reviews.positives: This place was amazing, its a lovely Japanese style resort with a fantastic onsen with all the usual Japanese baths inside. A wonderful place to relax. its very comfortable and the rooms are large with very comfortable beds. very luxurious. the staff were very nice and very accommodating. instead of an early checkin or late check out you can spend your time waiting in the onsen.
reviews.negatives: a long way from town and awkward to get to.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Kawara My An Onsen Resort, nơi đáng đến….
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Trần,
Chân thành cám ơn anh đã chọn Kawara My An Onsen Resort cho kỳ lưu trú của mình và có những đánh giá rất tích cực về Khu nghỉ dưỡng của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi Quý khách rất thích thú và hài lòng với các dịch vụ của Khu nghỉ dưỡng, điều này tạo động lực cho chúng tôi cố gắng hoàn thành tốt hơn nữa công việc của mình.
Một lần nữa cám ơn anh và gia đình đã tin tưởng chúng tôi. Rất mong được có cơ hội phục vụ quý gia đình trong một tương lai gần.
Chúc anh và gia đình luôn tràn đầy sức khỏe và may mắn.

reviews.title: Love this Resort
reviews.positives: This place is not to be missed. Absolutely 5 stars ⭐ ⭐ ⭐⭐ ⭐ in everyway...the ambiance, the rooms, the Onsen baths, the pool and the gym!! The restaurant is absolutely incredible, 10 star service and 10 star food! If you are in Vietnam and wondering where to go next, book a ticket to Hue and stay at this Resort!
reviews.negatives: Everything was absolutely perfect!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good service and clean hotel. I hope there’ll be more staff in Japanese resto.
reviews.response:
Dear Quyen,

Thank you for taking the time to rate and give nice feedback. We do hope you having a wonderful time at Kawara My An Onsen Resort.
We are happy you like the service of Japanese Onsen and the cleanness of the Resort. We thank to your ideas for  Restaurant (Mai restaurant) and will improve that as soon as possible. 
We are looking forward to serving you again shortly. 
Wishing you all the best!  

Best regards,

reviews.title: Best spa resort in the area
reviews.positives: I am a huge fan of this resort - I love their onsen and already visited twice, second time especially for that. I will definitely come again.
reviews.negatives: The location is not very close to most Hue attractions. However if you are there for a relaxing weekend - that's not a problem at all. The city centre is 20 min by car.

reviews.title: Wonderful staff - excellent onset facilities
reviews.text: We’d a good time at the Kobi onsen resort. However, there was an event during our stay. The noise from building of the stage and the heavy metal rock at night that gave us the headache and kept us awake past midnight. Even though they’ve sent a letter to inform us, but the event went on well past the scheduled time (9:30pm). We honestly think that the management should have done better by moving us to the back of the onsen, away from the stage and the terrible noise from the 400w lound speakers
reviews.response:
Xin chào Mr. Khoi,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stay at Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá.

We are truly pleased to know that you had a good overall experience and that you appreciated our team as well as the onsen facilities. Your kind words are greatly valued.
At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the noise from the event during your stay. We fully understand how disruptive this must have been, especially when it extended beyond the communicated schedule and affected your rest. Please accept our apologies that we did not proactively offer a more suitable room relocation away from the event area.

Your feedback is extremely important to us, and we are currently reviewing our event planning and guest communication processes to ensure better noise control, stricter adherence to schedules, and more thoughtful arrangements for our in-house guests in the future.

Thank you once again for your valuable comme

reviews.title: Very nice resort, beautiful Onsen even though I didn't get to try them all
reviews.positives: Very clean and upscale resort
reviews.negatives: Food choices for breakfast and dinner weren't that great

reviews.title: Great customer services
reviews.text:
I booked the grand 3 bedrooms Villa.
The stair to the2 bedrooms on the second floor is too small, it’s hard to carry my luggages upstairs. Rooms are big and clean. But the bathroom shampoo, conditioner and bath gel bottles are not clean. TV is not working well. Nothing too watch. Breakfast is good. Staff is kind and polite.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Ms. Rosa,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay in our Villa with Private Onsen and for taking the time to share your feedback.

We are delighted to know that you appreciated the spacious and clean rooms, enjoyed the breakfast, and found our staff kind and polite. Your recognition of our customer service truly means a lot to our team.

At the same time, we sincerely regret that some aspects of your stay did not fully meet your expectations. Please rest assured that your comments have been noted and shared internally for review and improvement, as we continuously strive to enhance our facilities and overall guest experience.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future for an even more enjoyable stay.

Warmest regards,

Linh Le
Guest Service Manager
reviews.room_type: Grand Three Bedroom Villa With Private Onsen

reviews.title: Beautiful Relaxing Stay
reviews.positives: Amazing hotel and the staff wonderful and friendly. Breakfast buffet was delicious with many hot and cold options and the restaurant was situated in a beautiful area. Onsen with hot springs, bathing pools and sauna very enjoyable and totally relaxing.
reviews.negatives: Bit far to travel into Hue but they do have a courtesy bus going into Hue in the morning and then pick you up in the afternoon or like us we used Grab.

reviews.title: 3 day trip in Feb
reviews.text: Great room, huge & comfortable bed & pillows.  Restaurant for dinner & breakfast was exceptional, although a bigger wine selection would be appreciated.  Other great features we liked included the Swimming pool, gym & massage.  Overall very good & would recommend.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Paul,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your wonderful review following your 3-night stay in February.

We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed your room with the huge and comfortable bed and pillows. It is also a pleasure to hear that your dining experiences for both dinner and breakfast were exceptional. Your kind words about our swimming pool, gym, and massage services mean a great deal to our team.

We sincerely appreciate your suggestion regarding a wider wine selection. Please rest assured that your feedback has been shared with our Food & Beverage team for consideration, as we continuously strive to enhance our guests’ experiences.

Thank you once again for your recommendation. We look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing getaway in the near future.

Warmest regards,

Linh Le
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The Onsen is amazing, room is spacious

reviews.title: Resort Villa
reviews.text: The resort is nice and away from Hue City. The facility grounds is beautiful and the luxury onsen was nice. Restaurant was a bit lacking in both dinner and breakfast.
reviews.response:
Xin chào Mr./ Ms. Odin,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stay at Kobi Onsen Resort Hue, Affiliated by Meliá.

We are pleased to know that you enjoyed the peaceful location, the beautiful resort grounds, and the luxury onsen experience. At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your honest comments regarding our restaurant offerings. Your feedback has been shared with our culinary team for review, as we continuously strive to enhance both the quality and variety of our dining experiences.

Thank you once again for your valuable input. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with an even more satisfying stay in the future.

Linh Le

reviews.title: It was a great stay. I love the breakfast and we were happy because we got a room which is at the corner. Though the roo

Linh Lê
Quản lý Dịch vụ Khách hàng

reviews.title: Anti-Relaxation
reviews.positives: Les infrastructures de l’hôtel sont bien faites.
reviews.negatives: Cet hôtel avait tout pour être parfait, des infrastructures modernes, un bassin super beau, de belles chambres malheureusement notre séjour n’a pas été à la hauteur du prix payé. Il n’y a aucune isolation dans les chambres, préparez vous à attendre des enfants mal élevés hurler dans le couloir des 6H du matin. Nous avons dû changer de chambre la première nuit car des clients mettaient la musique à fond dans leur chambre et des enfants hurlaient. Nous avons essayé la piscine et là encore plusieurs enfants jetaient des pierres dans la piscine, les parents ne disaient rien et le personnel était désabusée. C’est inadmissible de voir ce genre de comportement dans un hôtel 5 étoiles. Sachez qu’avoir de l’argent ne vous empêche pas de respecter les autres. Au check-out personne ne nous a demandé si ça c’était bien passé, heureusement.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: This hotel and staff exceeded my expectations.  It was a welcome respite from the crowds. The staff are excellent and provided very good service.  I enjoyed the japanese baths and the breakfast options were very good.  The resort us away from the center, but worth it (15-20 min.) Away.  Very good value for a resort.
reviews.room_type: Family Connecting Suite With Onsen Access

reviews.title: 24 heures de bruit
reviews.positives: Le lieu est très joli en arrivant, les chambres sont propres. J'aurai bien aimé les Onsen et le Ganban... s'ils n'avaient pas été gâchés par des hordes d'enfants et d'adultes qui hurlent.
reviews.negatives:
Honnêtement, l'un des séjours les plus stressants que j'ai pu faire avec mon compagnon, seules les carpes Koi ne nous ont pas déclenché des crises de panique. Nous avions d'ailleurs réservés pour 2 nuits et avons fuit au bout d'1, ce qui ne m'était jamais arrivée. Pour être clair, le resort recherche une clientèle bien spécifique : les familles asiatiques. On a eu le droit à des enfants qui hurlent dans les couloirs de l'hôtel (toute la matinée) et nous réveillent à 6h30, des enfants qui tapent aux vitres du Ganban parce que la salle de jeux est juste à côté, des enfants qui courent dans les Onsen, un petit-déjeuner à l'intensité sonore digne d'une piscine olympique, un restaurant qui se situe à 5m d'un... cinéma en plein air (on a mangé avec Garfield le Film, chic), des groupes qui viennent fêter des anniversaires sono à fond... sans parler de la nourriture trop chère pour des quantités ridicules, et du problème de réservation en arrivant qui nous a valu 20 minutes d'attente dans les canapés. A savoir aussi : 1 ticket d'entrée Onsen par jour, il faut donc repayer si vous voulez y faire un saut matin et soir. Et piscine fermée quand nous y étions.
Le pire, en plus du non respect global du lieu par ses clients, c'est de voir le personnel être complètement désabusé. Seule une dame, voyant ma panique, a fini par demander à un groupe de vietnamiens de -littéralement- arrêter de hurler dans le Ganban. Bref, j'aurai voulu cette ambiance j'aurai booké Disney Land. Les Onsen et le Ganban devraient être interdits aux enfants, point, et des appels au calme devraient être effectués par le personnel, même si éduquer des enfants et surtout des adultes n'est logiquement le travail de personne.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It's a bit far from the center, so for eating and drinking, you need to go into the city; otherwise, my experience here is quite good. The breakfast selection isn't too extensive, but the quality is delicious, and I really enjoyed the onsen (except for the entrance and exit being a bit slippery due to the water; if it could be cleaned more frequently, it would be better).

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Le site qui est très beau.
reviews.negatives:
Les règles qui s'imposent dans les bains onsen n'étaient pas respectés au point que nous avons renoncé au second onsen. Des gens avec des enfants parlaient forts, se baignaient avec leurs serviettes et le personnel était incapable de gérer le lieu. C'était plus près d'une piscine municipale que d'un bain onsen. Le problème c'est que l'hôtel met en valeur son onsen et que c'est pour ça que nous y avons passé 2 nuits. Il y a comme une sorte de publicité mensongère. 
A fuir

reviews.title: great onsen and food
reviews.text: Excellent resort to spoil your group with onsen, good food, relaxing environment.  Fabulous facilities.  The amazing city of Hue is 20mins by taxi.

Établissement fréquenté principalement par des locaux, donc extrêmement bruyant. Il faut éviter absolument d’y séjourner les week-ends et en période du têt forcément.
Le service de navettes ne fonctionne que 3 fois par semaine. Sinon, prévoir un budget pour le Grab.

Unfortunately we had a screaming kids of other families running in our hallway so if it weren’t for them we could have slept in but other than that it was worth it!

reviews.title: Nơi nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng
reviews.text:
Cons: hơi xa trung tâm thành phố Huế.

Pros: Rất nhiều điểm tốt:
+ Khu vực tắm onsen xây dựng đẹp, hợp lý, phục vụ chu đáo. Mình tắm onsen từ 10h đến 12h sáng nên rất vắng người. Giá hợp lý, mình đặt Agoda có 1,5tr/ đêm đã gồm 1 lần tắm Onsen và ko giới hạn thời gian.
+ nhà hàng trong khách sạn nấu ngon, phục vụ tốt, nhưng giá mắc. 
+ Phòng rộng và đẹp dù chỉ là loại cơ bản. Tất cả các phòng đều có ban công và có view.
+ đại sảnh và sân vườn khách sạn rất đẹp. Không bị muỗi.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi chị Trang,
KOBI Onsen Resort Hue xin chân thành cảm ơn chị Trang đã lựa chọn dịch vụ tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng. 
Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết anh Nhật đã có thời gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời và đặc biệt ưa thích dịch vụ tắm khoáng nóng Onsen, phòng khách sạn với ban công view đẹp, ẩm thực tại nhà hàng và không gian sân vườn tại KOBI Onsen Resort Hue.
Chúng tôi  trân trọng từng nhận xét của quý khách hàng, đặc biệt là chia sẻ chi tiết của chị, vì những góp ý của quý khách liên tục giúp chúng tôi ngày càng nâng cao dịch vụ và cơ sở vật chất của mình. 
Rất mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp chị Trang trở lại KOBI Onsen Resort Hue trong thời gian sớm nhất. 
Kính chúc quý khách hạnh phúc, sức khoẻ và bình an!
Trân trọng,

Si vous souhaitez passer quelques jours excentré, en séjour bien-être c'est le bon hôtel

reviews.negatives:
Nous étions un peu éloignés du centre donc pas forcément pratique pour nous mais en avons profité pour nous reposer.
Par contre je suis quand même déçue parce que j'ai payé deux nuits dans un hôtel luxueux en espérant dormir correctement et il y avait un groupe qui faisait beaucoup de bruit dans le couloir. J'ai appelé la réception mais malheureusement ça n'a pas suffit. J'ai eu du mal à m'endormir.
Vers 6h30 j'ai été réveillée de nouveau par des gens qui parlaient fort dans le couloir. Vers 7h quelq'un qui a crié très fort, j'ai fait un bon dans le lit ! Et en plus je me suis réveillée avec un mal de dos. Bref 1ere nuit franchement pourrie.
J'en ai parlé à la fin du séjour et j'espérais avoir au moins un geste commercial, même juste m'offrir les cacahuètes ! Mais non. Donc plutôt déçue

reviews.title: Bon

reviews.negatives: Le restaurant avec une carte sur iPad peu pratique et sans photos, choix japonais limité. Très loin du centre : compter 20 minutes en taxi

reviews.title: Grand three bedrooms Villa
reviews.text:
I book a grand 3 bedrooms villa to stay with family. I got the  number 1 Villa its next to the parking lot so people working outside can see our onsen and opposite high floor rooms.  When i was naked in our onsen I could see their gardeners outside and can see people on their balconies adjacent to the Villa, so don't take the #1 Grand 3 bedrooms Villa. you can choose 2 bedrooms Villa is nicer. Breakfast was delicious, rooms are okay not that big.  Bedrooms and Bathrooms are cleaned but the shampoo bottles got dirt or mold on the caps, and the Tv sometimes works sometimes not work. 
Staff was awesome and attentive, they are very friendly. Everything else was great. Will definitely come back to this resort.

reviews.title: Bon séjour en dehors de la ville pour se ressourcer

reviews.negatives: L'odeur de souffre dans les bains Osen.

reviews.title: The best hot spring hotels in Vietnam.
reviews.text: This hotel has a full-fledged onsen facility and is the best I've experienced among the various hot springs I've visited in Vietnam. The breakfast is delicious and has a wide variety, which is great. Since it's located away from the city, you'll need a taxi or a private car. There are a few restaurants about a 7-minute walk away. If you love hot springs, it's definitely worth a visit. The staff are all kind and overflowing with smiles. The rooms are clean and the facilities are very good. Since it is situated in the middle of rice paddies, you shouldn't expect a spectacular view.

reviews.title: Beautiful and relaxing but...
reviews.text: Overall the views, amenities and service that the staff provided was amazing, the few issues we had was 1) the security guard was rude to our drivers, and if you order food you'll have to collect it at the main gate by the way, the delivery riders are not allowed to go to the lobby which is very troublesome... 2) don't bother washing your clothes here, you're not allowed to hang your wet clothes at the balcony and they don't provide a drying rack, which is not ideal for travellers who would want to save some extra bucks from getting their laundry service. 3) for a 5 stars hotel, free bottled water are limited, limited to 2 per day and anything after that are chargeable. Those are some issues we had that affected our stay, wouldn't say they're big issues... but it definitely affected us in some ways.

reviews.title: Exceptional 5* facility and service for perfect getaway
reviews.text: We stayed in connecting rooms, super clean and new with balcony and a set of wooden table/chairs with view of the onsen building and the green field. Fantastic view!! Yukata were provided, and we could borrow yukata for children too. There is a microwave and stove in 1 of the room but no pan. We were able to order GradFood delivery and pick up at the gate. There were many free activitities on site, including swimming pool, gym, cycling, outdoor movie night with pop corn, and others that we didn't have the chance to try (kite flying, yoga...). The onsen is fantastic - reminded us of Spa world in Korea. Breakfast is delicious with many western and eastern options, and the restaurant view is serene. Staff is friendly and joyful, despite checkout a bit time consuming than I expected. The hotel location is far from Hue city though - i guess to be at the onsen site. Our family loved it. We look forward to be back and introduce the hotel to our parents.

reviews.positives: Hôtel de haut standing, très propre avec un personnel sympathique. Un petit déjeuner immense.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: For my family, Kobi Onsen is a wonderful place. The campus has a strong Japanese style, delicious food, clean rooms, and especially the toilets equipped with high-quality Japanese electronic toilet devices that are very satisfactory. The onsen bathing area is extremely wonderful. The only downside is that the children's play area (playground/kids club) does not have the air conditioning turned on. I don't know if the hotel is saving electricity in that area due to few children coming to play or for another reason, but when my child and some other kids went in to play, they could only last 5-10 minutes before sweating a lot and had to go outside. Even though I asked the staff to turn on the air conditioning, it seems that to keep that area cool, one would have to wait for an hour or several hours. I am very disappointed about this. Compared to some other 5-star resorts I have visited, this is a significant drawback at Kobi, as in other places, even if there were few children playing, the air conditioning was still pleasantly cool. Aside from that drawback, everything else was wonderful, and I will return to Kobi when I have the chance.

We loved our stay so much, we had to come back for 2 more nights.

reviews.title: Un séjour d’exception alliant confort, gastronomie, bien-être et qualité de service.
reviews.positives:
Notre séjour au Kobi Onsen Resort Hue a été une véritable parenthèse de bien-être et de sérénité. Nous avons été séduits par la qualité globale des infrastructures : la piscine est parfaitement entretenue, le petit déjeuner est varié, copieux et savoureux, et la literie d’un confort remarquable. Mention spéciale à la villa Onsen, qui a largement dépassé nos attentes : spacieuse, élégamment aménagée, avec un onsen privatif qui offre un luxe rare et une expérience intimiste de grande qualité.

Les restaurants de l’établissement sont également à souligner : les plats proposés sont d’une grande finesse, mêlant spécialités locales et internationales avec raffinement. Le service est attentionné et les produits sont frais et bien travaillés, ce qui renforce encore la qualité de l’ensemble de l’expérience.

L’équipe de l’hôtel s’est montrée exemplaire, toujours disponible, bienveillante, et à l’écoute des moindres besoins. Le sens du service est indéniablement un point fort du resort.

Enfin, les installations bien-être sont variées et remarquables : bains de boue, saunas, hammams… et bien sûr le véritable onsen japonais, d’une authenticité rare. L’usage se fait nu, ce qui peut surprendre initialement, mais une fois la gêne dépassée, c’est un moment apaisant, hors du temps.
reviews.negatives: Rien de significatif.

reviews.title: There are points that are not clear.
reviews.text:
Hello everyone. 
Although I only had a one-day stay, I was truly impressed by the enthusiasm of the staff and the cleanliness of the resort. However, there is one unclear point:
When I booked the Kobi Onsen room on the Agoda website, I selected and was confirmed that the room was sufficient for 4 adults and 2 children. Even though I was traveling with just my family of 4 (two adults and two kids), I wanted more space, so I chose the option for a room that accommodates 4 adults and 2 children for free.
When checking in at the resort, I was informed that it was a studio room with a fairly small double bed, not big enough for both parents and the two small children to sleep comfortably. 
This was somewhat different from the information I received when booking.
The resort is very good. I will return if I come to Hue. 
Thank you sincerely.

reviews.text:
Enjoyed the spacious villa with 2 bedrooms, cosy living and tea space, as well as warm sunny veranda. Best is the private outdoor onsen pool with direct flow of warm water. In room dining was well served. Better to have some tea leaves in the tea room, not just tea bag. 
Public onsen is a bit far but ok to walk, clean and well maintained. However, biggest downside is that it's not unlimited entry, but only one entry is allowed. Once used, you have to buy new tickets if needed. I think it's not very nice this way, esp. for such high room rate. Even in Japan, all the onsen resorts or ryokans I have been to offer unlimited entry for onsen bathing.

Thân mến,

Linh Lê
Quản lý Dịch vụ Khách hàng

reviews.title: Wunderschön
reviews.positives:
Der Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm und entspannend- eine außergewöhnliche Erfahrung.

Die Anlage ist wunderschön, besonders der Koi Teich und der Pavillon.
Das Zimmer war geräumig und stilvoll sowie hochwertig eingerichtet und wurde jeden Tag tadellos gereinigt.
Die Mitarbeitenden waren allesamt sehr engagiert, freundlich und fürsorglich.
Besonders lieb waren die Damen im Restaurant (Cuc, Linh und Ai sind hier allen voran zu nennen:))

Die Speisekarte des Restaurants ist sehr gut und bietet umfassende Auswahl. Unser Highlight war das Frühstücksbuffet, das keine Wünsche offengelassen hat.

Der Spa- und Onsenbereich ist ebenso schön, sauber und stilvoll, wir haben dort jede Sekunde genossen.
(Auch war es dort immer sehr ruhig, wenige Gäste)

Der Indoor-Spielplatz war auch wunderbar und eine tolle Möglichkeit unser Kind bei schlechtem Wetter spielen zu lassen.
reviews.negatives:
Als persönliche Erfahrung würde ich in Zukunft bei einem längeren Aufenthalt nicht mehr Halbpension wählen, da das Menü für mich als Vegetarier nicht allzu viel Auswahl und Abwechslung geboten hat. (Auch wenn das Essen an sich jedes Mal wundervoll war. Jedoch gab es viele Dinge, die ich lieber nach Laune des Tages von der offenen Karte bestellt hätte.)

Es hat mich etwas irritiert, dass in einem Spa Resort kein kostenloses Wasser zur Verfügung gestellt wird, sondern eine 0,5l Flasche mit 50.000VND berechnet wird. 

Auch fand ich es etwas schwierig mit der Zeit, dass von morgens bis abends Weihnachtsmusik lief. Ich hätte es angenehmer gefunden, wenn zum Ambiente passende Musik dazwischen gespielt worden wäre.

reviews.title: Fantastische Auszeit mit tollem Spa-Bereich
reviews.positives: Das Kobi Onsen Resort Hue hat uns wirklich positiv überrascht. Unser Aufenthalt war sehr entspannt und ruhig. Unsere sehr geräumigen Zimmer waren zum Garten hin ausgerichtet, so dass wir eine schöne Aussicht auf die sehr geschmackvoll angelegte Anlage mit ihrem gepflegten japanischen Garten und dem riesigen Teich mit Koi Karpfen hatten, und im Hintergrund die Reisfelder. Trotz der abgeschiedenen Lage (wofür wir uns bewusst entschieden hatten) ist die Erreichbarkeit per Grab-Taxi sehr gut. Während unseres Aufenthaltes hat es fast die gesamte Zeit geregnet, was aber nicht schlimm war, da Spa & Wellnessbereich einfach top sind. Bei besserem Wetter hätten wir den Möglichkeiten hier gar nicht Genüge tun können. Wir haben das Onsen ausgiebig genutzt, zudem können wir das Schlammbad und die wirklich sehr, sehr guten Massagen im Spa empfehlen. Außerdem kann man in der Poolbar Billard und Golfsimulation spielen, so dass wir trotz Dauerregen gut beschäftigt waren. Das Frühstück war auf dem von Melia zu erwartenden, sehr guten Niveau mit riesiger Auswahl in exzellenter Qualität und engagiertem Servicepersonal. Wir können das Kobi Onsen Resort uneingeschränkt empfehlen und würden es bei einem weiteren Besuch in Hue definitiv wieder wählen.

reviews.title: Good service quality, very satisfied.
reviews.text:
Apart from some points that need improvement as mentioned below, there is nothing to complain about. 
- The remote battery should be checked; I stayed for 2 nights but could only use the remote for 1 day before the battery died. :(
- In addition to toothpaste, a razor should be provided in the bathroom.
- The checkout time was a bit long, probably due to the holiday and the large number of guests.

I really enjoyed the onsen, the experience in Kobi was even better than in Japan, but the ticket price is a bit expensive. :( When bathing, many guests spat in the pool, and children sometimes act out, which can affect the experience of others. I think there should be regulations and reminders. Customers may be treated as kings, but if there are no reminders or regulations, it will affect others.

The staff were friendly and very supportive. I will definitely return for another experience next time.
reviews.response:
Xin chào anh Thien,

reviews.room_type: Family Connecting Room With Onsen Access

reviews.title: VERO 5 STELLE
reviews.positives:
Un vero 5 stelle di lusso, la stanza molto bella e ordinata, letto enorme, potevano dormirci tranquillamente 5 persone, doccia fantastica e tazza alla giapponese, spettacolo.
Riguardo la stanza c'erano proprio piccole pecche, ossia, il finestrone che da sul balcone rotto (non si riusciva a chiudere), la lampada della scrivania macchiata, la tv senza funzioni Smart e una porta (chiusa a chiave) comunicante con la stanza accanto.
Il servizio SPA ottimo, massaggio meraviglioso in un'atmosfeta davvero piacevole.
Albergo in se dall'esterno, così come nella Hall, molto bello, da mozzafiato davvero, lo stagno esterno, così come le cascate annesse.
A mio avviso il punto forte è la colazione, mai visto nulla del genere, c'è tutto quello che una persona possa immaginare, sia per gli amanti del dolce che del salato, un chef in sala pronto a cucinare diverse cose all'istante, varietà di succhi, frutta e caffè, cioè avevo problemi a scegliere come iniziare la giornata, spettacolo puro.
Un problema potrebbe essere la posizione, ahimè un pò di stante dal centro di Hue, infatti la prima sera tutti gli autisti Grab rifiutavano la chiamata (cose che poi stranamente non è successa il giorno dopo), ma in compenso si gode di una bella pace.
Struttura in stile giapponese (addirittura in SPA è possibile usufruire del pass per l'Onsen).
Lo consiglio vivamente, per rapporto qualità/prezzo è la scelta giusta.

reviews.title: Phù hợp cho nghỉ dưỡng
reviews.text:

reviews.title: Không phù hợp cho trẻ nhỏ
reviews.positives:
- Villa rộng rãi, có vườn thoáng mát và bồn onsen private. Giường rộng, êm, phòng đầy đủ tiện nghi.
- Nhân viên ở lớp nấu ăn, lớp gấp giấy, và bác bảo vệ ngoài cổng rất niềm nở
reviews.negatives:
- Khu vui chơi trẻ em ở 1 căn phòng trong góc, không cửa sổ, trần thấp, rất bí bách, nóng nực, đặc biệt là máy điều hòa cũng hỏng trong suốt thời gian mình ở resort (5 ngày).
- Rất nhiều đinh ốc, sợi dây sắt thép rỉ vương vãi quanh khu vườn nơi trẻ em chơi, và cả ở quanh bồn onsen trong villa
- Quảng cáo có dịch vụ thả diều, ra đến nơi không có gì
- Bể bơi trẻ em hỏng, đóng cửa
- Rất khó gọi điện cho lễ tân từ phòng, có thể vì lượng lễ tân quá ít
- Lễ tân bảo "xin chờ 1 chút", cho put on hold rồi dập máy
- Hỏi lễ tân các thông tin cơ bản như địa điểm tổ chức lớp nấu ăn, giờ học yoga... cũng không biết
- Đặt lớp origami qua lễ tân, hôm sau đến nơi thì các cô giáo không nhận được thông báo gì
- Lễ tân báo khu lớp nấu ăn là ở khu nhà onsen. Hôm sau đến học thì lại bảo ở nhà hàng cách xa đó
- Phòng toilet cho người tàn tật ở khu chung bị khóa, gây khó khăn cho cha mẹ đi cùng em nhỏ muốn sử dụng (2 bố mẹ cùng chăm bé, hoặc bố đi cùng bé gái, mẹ đi cùng bé trai)

reviews.title: Family vacation
reviews.text:
Recently, I took my parents to a 2-day, 1-night resort stay at this place. The compliments go to the service and staff, who are very polite and friendly in assisting the family. Since my father has difficulty moving and requires a wheelchair, the staff always welcomed us with smiles.
- The room is clean and well-arranged.
- Friendly staff, very helpful.
- The spa area, swimming pool, and onsen are clean (the outdoor onsen pool in the 9-step onsen package was a bit dirty).
- The dinner at the restaurant with various Vietnamese dishes was quite delicious and to our taste.
- The breakfast buffet was average, so it could include more local dishes.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text:
The resort is a wonderful and memorable place during my long trip to many hotels for the Tet holiday 2024. Everything was fantastic, with nothing to criticize, although it is a bit far from the center, which is perfect for those who need peace and quiet, without the hustle and bustle. Since I stayed in the new urban area of Hue, the police made our journey from the center to the resort a bit troublesome. 

Looking at the room in photos seems normal, but once I experienced it, I found it to be amazing; everything was nearly perfect in terms of overall space arrangement, furnishings in the room, and the interior decoration details, even the toilet had a smart toilet seat. 

The resort clearly reflects Japanese spirit in its construction and customer service; overall, although it seems simple, it feels cozy. When experiencing it, I could feel the lightness and especially the delicacy in even the smallest details. Everything is polite and calm. 

The staff is excellent, thoughtful, dedicated, and professional. The onsen bathrooms are very beautiful, clean, and of good quality from the showers to the seating, though I wonder if it gets crowded when there are many people. 

The breakfast buffet offers a variety of delicious dishes. 

In general, the resort is a deserving place to enjoy a relaxing and rejuvenating vacation; it feels truly worth the time and money spent here. I had to leave early to continue my journey but I felt a sense of reluctance.

reviews.response:
Dear Hoan,

Thank you for taking the time to provide your review. I appreciate that you found the facilities to be pleasant and the staff to be welcoming. If you have any specific suggestions on how we can improve our food quality, please let us know. We appreciate all feedback as it helps us to enhance our guest experience. Thank you for choosing our Resort, and we hope to see you again soon.
Best regards,

reviews.title: Rất hài lòng
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng rất tuyệt. Nhân viên phục vụ nhiệt tình, lịch sự. Khu tắm onsen sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: I would recommend this place, especially hotel rooms facing the inside of the resorr
reviews.response:
Dear Tran,

Thank you for taking the time to rate us with good feedback.
We very much appreciate your feedback, it continually allows us the opportunity to improve our service and facilities.
We do hope to serve you and your group in the future.
Wishing you all the best.

Best regards,

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Mình đi ngày thường nên tắm onsen không đông người, không khí tại resort thích hợp để thư giãn, nghĩ dưỡng với thiên nhiên trong lành. Hồ cá KOI rộng, nhìn khá là chill.
reviews.negatives: Tủ đựng đồ  khu onsen bị hư nên không khóa được, cửa phòng khách sạn mở lúc được lúc không :(

reviews.title: Japanese Atmosphere in Vietnam
reviews.text:
We had a great time here .. the staff very extremely friendly and helpful. The spa treatments were rejuvenating and masseuse were awesome and skillful too. 

Sparkling clean room and well maintained in premises 

Will definitely come back again for the Japanese hospitality
reviews.response:
Dear Rajasegaran,

Thank you so much for staying with us during your time in Hue city. We are glad you like the excellent attitude of the staff and the service such as the spa and the cleanness of the room. I sent your praise to the masseuse, they are so happy and miss you.
We hope to see you next time.
Wishing you all the best. 
Best regards,

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.positives: Không gian thư giãn có tắn onsen
reviews.negatives: Chưa có

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: nice place for relaxation in Hue city
reviews.response:
Dear An,
We would like to express our thanks for rating us with a nice review. We do hope you have a wonderful experience with the Japanese Onsen and other services such as steam bath and sauna, iKi sauna, etc... Your compliments encourage us so much.
We are looking forward to seeing you again shortly. 

Wishing you happiness, health, and peace!  

Best regards,

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Giá tốt. Không gian đẹp. Giường ngủ rất ngon. Sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên hơi chậm chắc do khách sạn mới mở. Khu vực tắm gia đình mùi khoáng hơi nồng do tính chất đặc trưng.
